message:
feat(glamour): Add table rendering utilities

Extend the glamour table module with new rendering utilities for
consistent table output formatting. Update beads issue tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-212m.6.8","title":"Bubbles: cursor parity audit","description":"Audit Cursor component parity vs Go.

Scope:
- Compare cursor modes (blink/static/hidden) and rendering alignment with text input.
- Expand fixtures for mode switching and visibility toggles.
- Add unit tests for cursor state transitions and view output.
- Fix any discrepancies uncovered.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Conformance fixtures cover cursor mode transitions and rendering.
- Unit tests validate cursor view strings for each mode.
- Any parity gaps fixed and documented.","notes":"Files: crates/bubbles/src/cursor.rs, tests/conformance/crates/bubbles/mod.rs (cursor fixtures).","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:51:10.809980968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T15:28:28.260940126Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T15:28:28.260920039Z","close_reason":"Completed: cursor view uses inline styles; added padding/inline tests; clippy clean","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:51:10.809980968Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.6.9","title":"Bubbles: keybinding parity audit","description":"Audit Keybinding component parity vs Go.

- Compare keybinding enable/disable, toggles, and display formatting.
- Expand fixtures for multi-binding entries and disabled states.
- Add unit tests for keybinding equality and formatting.

 {"id":"bd-212m.7","title":"Wish/Platform limitations verification","description":"Verify and resolve README platform limitations (Wish SSH beta, Windows SSH untested, mouse drag, complex Unicode).

Scope:
- Run stability + parity audits for Wish SSH sessions.
- Validate Windows SSH compatibility (manual or CI).
- Audit Unicode handling across lipgloss/bubbletea/glamour.
- Update README + FEATURE_PARITY.md with verified status.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Each limitation is either resolved (with tests) or documented with evidence and justification.
- README limitations section updated to reflect verified state.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with audit findings.","notes":"Files: crates/wish/src/*, crates/lipgloss/src/*, crates/bubbletea/src/*, crates/glamour/src/*, README.md.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:03.101452806Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:29:52.433475522Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7","depends_on_id":"bd-212m","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:03.101452806Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Add stress tests for multiple concurrent SSH sessions (open/close, PTY resize).
- Add integration tests for TUI over SSH (smoke run).
- Fix any discrepancies or document limitations.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:

- Integration tests demonstrate stable multi-session handling.

 {"id":"bd-212m.7.2","title":"Wish: Windows SSH compatibility test","description":"Validate Wish SSH compatibility on Windows.

- Define test matrix (Windows Terminal + OpenSSH client/server).
- Run basic Wish server example and verify session establishment, input, and rendering.
- Capture logs + screenshots/recordings as evidence.
- Document any platform-specific limitations or fixes.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Windows SSH connection to Wish example succeeds and handles basic input/output.
- Any failures are documented with repro steps and filed as follow-up beads.

Use wish examples under crates/wish/examples.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:24.010044628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:30:07.160107163Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:24.010044628Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.7.3","title":"Unicode handling parity audit","description":"Audit Unicode handling parity (width, grapheme clusters, emoji) across Lipgloss/Glamour/Bubbletea.

Scope:
- Identify Unicode edge cases in Go (combining marks, wide glyphs, emoji sequences).
- Add fixtures and unit tests to reproduce width/layout behavior.
- Validate rendering + alignment with unicode-width and adjust if needed.
- Document any remaining limitations.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Tests cover combining marks, wide glyphs, and emoji in layout/rendering.
- Any discrepancies fixed or documented in README limitations.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with Unicode audit results.","notes":"Files: crates/lipgloss/src/renderer.rs, crates/glamour/src/lib.rs, crates/bubbletea/src/program.rs (width/layout). Use tests/conformance fixtures for Unicode.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:30.603884152Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T18:07:10.976285894Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T18:07:10.976265376Z","close_reason":"Added comprehensive Unicode parity tests to glamour and lipgloss. Tests cover: CJK (日本, 中文, 한글), emoji (🦀, 🎉), combining characters (e+acute), ZWJ, variation selectors, full-width Latin, half-width katakana. All tests pass, confirming unicode-width crate provides consistent Go-parity behavior.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:30.603884152Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.8","title":"Porting documentation completeness","description":"Audit and complete porting documentation (spec, architecture, plan).

- Update docs with any gaps discovered during parity work.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
